## Moderate Fix #13 — Increase Chapter Depth to Match Neon Relic Standards

**Status:** Should address  
**Affects:** All chapters

### Problem
Heroes of Legend chapters average ~45 lines. Neon Relic chapters average ~1,000 lines. The gap is 22×. HoL states every rule once and moves on. Neon Relic explains, exemplifies, justifies, cross-references, warns, and guides.

### Specific Expansion Targets for Each Chapter

| Chapter | Current Lines | Target Lines | What to Add |
|---------|---------------|-------------|-------------|
| 01 (Introduction) | 33 | 100+ | Expanded example of play, chapter roadmap, what you need |
| 02 (Character Creation) | 48 | 200+ | 3 worked character builds, quick-start pre-gens |
| 03 (Attributes) | 59 | 150+ | 2 examples per attribute, derived stats worked out |
| 04 (Ancestries) | 28 | 200+ | 3 cultures per ancestry with mechanics, naming guides |
| 05 (Classes) | 75 | 500+ | Each class gets full page spread with art placeholder |
| 06 (Core Resolution) | 76 | 250+ | Probability sidebar, 6+ worked examples, when-to-roll guidance |
| 07 (Skills) | 72 | 200+ | Each skill gets 2-3 sentence description with examples |
| 08 (Disciplines) | 91 | 200+ | More worked examples, Discipline-by-class progression tables |
| 09 (Talents) | 43 | 150+ | Full talent catalog (not just examples) |
| 10 (Magic System) | 46 | 200+ | Casting procedure, concentration, counterspell, ritual rules |
| 11 (Arcane Spells) | 5 | 2,000+ | Full spell catalog (this is the monster) |
| 12 (Divine Spells) | 5 | 800+ | Full divine spell catalog |
| 13 (Combat) | 62 | 300+ | All subsystems from Fix #106, 4+ combat examples |
| 14 (Social) | 19 | 100+ | Extended conflict rules, faction reputation |
| 15 (Equipment) | 45 | 200+ | Full gear catalog, encumbrance examples |
| 16 (Armor) | 23 | 80+ | Magic armor, degradation, donning times |
| 17 (Magic Items) | 20 | 150+ | 30+ items with Discipline interactions |
| 18 (Advancement) | 42 | 200+ | Full 1-20 progression tables per class |
| 19 (GM Guidance) | 22 | 300+ | Encounter building, treasure pacing, optional rules |
| 20 (Bestiary) | 29 | 400+ | 30 creatures from Fix #109 |
| 21 (Glossary) | 40 | 60+ | Already adequate, minor additions |
| 22 (Reference) | 26 | 50+ | Already adequate, update for flat damage |
| 23 (License) | 9 | 15+ | Already adequate |

### Implementation Approach
Expand chapters in priority order:
1. Chapters 03, 06, 08, 13 (core mechanical chapters — used every session)
2. Chapters 05, 07, 10 (referenced at character creation and level-up)
3. Chapters 04, 02, 09, 18 (creation process and advancement)
4. Chapters 14, 15, 16, 17 (equipment and social)
5. Chapters 11, 12 (spells — largest but used only by casters)
6. Chapters 19, 20 (GM reference — used only by DA)
7. Chapters 01, 01b, 21-23 (front/back matter)

### Success Criteria
- Average chapter depth reaches at least 150 lines (minimum)
- Every mechanical chapter has at least 2 worked examples
- Every chapter has at least 1 NOTE admonition
- Total PDF size increases from 918K to approximately 2-3MB


---
## Status Log — 2026-07-09

**ONGOING.** Chapter depth is an iterative concern. Each chapter improves as related issues are resolved. No discrete "done" state — depth increases with each pass. Will revisit after authorial voice (#105) is chosen.
